PLANNING WITH PURPOSE
Key Integrated Services
Our holistic approach to wealth management covers every area of your financial life, creating confidence and clarity so you can make the most of your wealth—and your life.
Financial Planning
Evidence-Based Investing
Retirement Planning
Strategic Tax Planning
Managing over $10.2B in client assets
Helping successful families for 40+ years
Fee-only fiduciary. Your interests come first.
97% client retention
Don’t just take our word for it. Here’s what our clients say:
4.9
Based on 39 reviews
1 year ago
Elizabeth K
Ever since we started working with Plancorp we have felt more at ease about our retirement. The assistance with getting organized financially and cleaning house is just what we needed to live worry free about the future.
1 year ago
Sue M
Plancorp is there for you! They are not only there to help you reach your financial goals, but also there to make sure you reach your personal goals. The first portion of our regular scheduled meetings are all about what is happening in my life. That becomes the base of our discussion of what financial needs I will have. Plancorp takes care of the entire family.
1 year ago
Ed S
Plancorp was the first financial planner to listen to our retirement goals. Then they structured a financial plan to reach those goals. Meet with us when needed. They are always accessible. Although we are not there largest client they make us feel like there most important client whenever we meet.
1 year ago
Virginia B
Plancorp has become family over the last 20 years supporting and guiding us through wholesale life changes. A mentor recommended Plancorp to us when our Boeing executive salary and bonus packages became more complex. They navigated us through investments, estate planning, and even job changes! The best thing about Plancorp is that they know my family, our interests and goals, and are helpful with questions that don't typically fit into financial planning. Plancorp has taken great care of us in areas we don't like to worry about.
Show more
1 year ago
Ken F
I was recently talking to a group of young and obviously successful people. Someone asked me for my single most important piece of financial advice. Without thinking, I responded, "Hire a great fee-only financial advisor. I have one and it has had a huge positive impact on the lives of everyone in my family." I was talking, of course, about my advisor at Plancorp. I went on to explain that a great advisor does far more than manage my portfolio. I think of him as my financial quarterback. In fact, it seems to me my advisor simply thinks his job is to make my life easier.
Show more
1 year ago
William D
Our Plancorp advisors showed a willingness to work with our existing accountant and estate planning attorneys, which we apppreciated. We find that they always take into account our investment preferences and make changes only with our approval. They make considerable effort to explain tax planning strategies. During an annual review they caught an error our accountant had made on a tax return which, after amending, will result in significant reduction in taxes due.
Show more
1 year ago
Jerry D
Excellent service for investing, estate planning, tax planning.
1 year ago
Judith G
Plancorp provided my husband and me with valuable guidance as we navigated selling our home, moving and putting in place financial plans for our future. Advisors were professional, informed and always willing to listen and explain. We have been more than satisfied with the plan they put in place for us. I also especially like the wealth of information available in monthly informative emails, special client events and the InspireHer program.
1 year ago
Carol W
My wife Carol and I have had a wonderful experience with Plancorp. Sara has been our advisor for many years. She has been so helpful and always answers any question we have is such a timely manner. She is always willing to listen to us. Plancorp has taken the worry out of our money management.Her knowledge and experience is priceless.
1 year ago
Keith Z
As a 12-year client of Plancorp, we continue to be satisfied with the advice we receive. We especially appreciate the heads-up we receive when we are eligible to benefit from obscure tax law provisions.
1 year ago
Pamela G
Jessie Weiss has been a great help to me for all my investment needs. Great company. Much better than the one I was with before.
1 year ago
Brian K
We love Sean Kyle! We haven't worked with Yezmin Thomas as long, but early indications are she is another winner. We have been very impressed with all the Plancorp employees we have encountered during the four years of our engagement. I often recommend Plancorp to friends and family.
1 year ago
Steve R
Chad Frazier does a great job. I appreciate his comments and advice on the market.
1 year ago
Sandra K
We’ve enjoyed working with all the members of Plancorp. We like working with with you, with Meaghan and Kelsie. Jaime is a great to deal with also. Our investments have done great. Our children are fortunate to also have your expertise We are very happy
1 year ago
Nancy J
I have felt a great deal of confidence in Plancorp since I moved my portfolio here 4 or so years ago. That was due to my original team of Brian Watson and Dr Bob. My current Plancorp team of Austin Lewis and Deanna Orf are great to work with. Their knowledge and attention has continued in my sense of confidence and comfort in the company. If I am ever asked for recommendations for a wealth management company, Plancorp is my response. Thank you for all you do to ensure my future and that of my dependents looks bright.
Show more
1 year ago
Jack L
I have been client of Plancorp for 20 + years and extremely pleased with services provided by entire organization but especially by Steve who introduced Kathleen and I during early years and smooth transition to Steven. Also when Larry joined Jeff and Steve I knew I was in the right place. Kathleen and I had been close personal friends with Dot and Larry since the 80's and that assured me I was going to be well taken care of!
1 year ago
Howard W
Everyone we’ve worked with at Plancorp has been excellent. From Steve Frank, to our present team of Derek Jess and Jackie Kelly, the attention and expertise provided has been exceptional. Though we pay a nontrivial fee for your services, you have proven yourselves to be worth every penny (now nickel). Our returns—net of fees—have almost always been positive, but the worth of your services is also found in the safety and security we enjoy through knowing our money is being managed by people who are knowledgeable, professional, honest, responsible and, just as importantly, genuinely concerned with our well-being. Turning our money over to Plancorp’s oversight ranks as the single best financial decision I’ve ever made.
Show more
1 year ago
Bob F
Im very happy with the Plancorp experience. Been with them for 17 years. We had two other family members join with Plancorp . They have a great team with diverse experiences and have gone the extra mile to do whats needed. Very pleased.
1 year ago
Marian K
We have been with Plancorp since 1992. We were interested in putting our finances in their hands because they seem so capable, but we didn’t have very much at that time so Jeff Buckner recommended that we combine what we have with some of the rest of our family. We did so, and we have been so pleased with their Personal service for all these years. We have watched as our financial situation got better and better due to their wise decisions. they really go out of their way to help you in every situation. They also give great parties!!!!
Show more
1 year ago
Dan F
Our experience with PlanCorp has been outstanding! The planning and delivery of services continues to be top notch! And most of all, PlanCorp has listened to the goals and objectives for our family and kept that top of mind since day one.
1 year ago
Andrew M
Brian I trust the investment strategies employed by Plancorp. I am comfortable with the frequency of communication personally and otherwise. I will never understand the "box" I am asked to check at the bottom of this survey. I could have been bought by the offer of a hamburger. No burger was offered.
1 year ago
Tom B
We came to Plancorp after a horrible experience with a non-fiduciary advisor. After over ten years with Plancorp, we are confident that our best interests are being looked after well. The wonderful advisor that we have been working with almost the entire time, Ben Schwartz, is absolutely great at managing our investments, and helping us with other matters that arise, like the recent passing of my Mother. Don't know what we'd do or where we'd be without Ben and Plancorp to work with.
Show more
1 year ago
Terri L
My relationship with PlanCorp employees has always been genuine and honest. I’ve always felt 100% safe in the guidance that my advisors have supplied. I know I am in good hands.
1 year ago
Linda R
Since I am a new client, I do not have a record yet of how my investments will do. But I have been extremely pleased so far with the knowledgeable, personal and focussed attention by the Plancorp team.
1 year ago
Bernadette H
I think Plancorp is a trustworthy company. I trust my financial planner. I wish the fees would not be so high.
1 year ago
Donna R
I had my annual financial review in person with Chad Frazier. As usual, he was very informative and helpful! He is also very easy to contact by phone or email
1 year ago
Janine F
Plancorp has been an invaluable resource for us since our beginning with them. They are holistic in their approach and provide valuable input for current needs as well as offering suggestions for future benefits for ourselves and our dependents. Their services extend far beyond managing our investments and have guided and implemented vehicles for the current and future benefit of our beneficiaries. They are extremely prompt in replying to our calls and emails and give 110% to all they do. Their fiscal responsibility towards our funds is very comforting in turbulent times.
Show more
1 year ago
Deb G
Derek has been terrific!
1 year ago
Robert S
Very satisfied with Plancorp’s service, indepence and advice, and I believe Dimensional funds are the best investment vehicle.
1 year ago
Robert G
I have been with PlanCorp for almost 10 years. We (my wife Joann and I) came to PlanCorp based on the recommendation of my Brother in law, Jim Bennett, after finding several discrepancies with our former money manager. We were introduced to Ben Schwartz, who explained in great detail what was happening with our financial planner, our investments, and our savings. He then explained how switching to PlanCorp would earn us better returns on our investments. I haven’t looked back. I have a great relationship with Ben, and PlanCorp, and would (and have), recommended PlanCorp to others. I Trust PlanCorp. It is as simple as that. Ben is a great financial advisor, friendly, and easy to talk to. I can’t imagine going anywhere else.
Show more
1 year ago
Nadia L
We love that Plancorp is research based and always filtering the latest studies on investing and how it fits into people's lives for us. We have found that working with the team gives us a great sense of stability and confidence. We have had some big life changes and being able to talk through them with our team makes us feel like we have thought everything through. Knowing that there's a team of experts who are making sure you aren't overlooking some important aspect of your short and long term financial plan is deeply comforting as we navigate uncertain times.
Show more
1 year ago
Patricia E
My husband and I have been Plancorp clients since 2016. We are grateful for the advice and counsel provided by our Plancorp representatives since that time, before our retirement and after. I would encourage young people to start even sooner in planning for retirement with Plancorp.
1 year ago
Molly F
I would never trust the internet/AI with a question that I had about my financials. The internet might be the start, but it is not the finish. An article might prompt me to ask my advisor a question, but I would never want to use it solely for my decision making. Plancorp comprehensive level of excellent service is what makes it stand apart from other advisories. It is also what drives business to the firm: referrals. I would never do business with an advisory because I heard an ad on the radio, tv, or social media actually it is a turnoff. I would do business with one because a trusted friend told me about the excellent personal service that they received there. The pendulum has swung the other way. Yes, we have access to more information/data than we have ever had before, but the accuracy of that information and the context in which it is given is flawed. Most people don’t have the critical thinking skills or time to sift through it all. Personal touch makes Plancorp special.
Show more
1 year ago
Teri P
I’m not sure where I would start, but having my finances with Plancorp has been a weight lifted off my shoulders. The team they put together to help me navigate through some difficult times has allowed me to live my best life. They have put my mind at ease through these volatile times on the market.. as best they can! 😵‍💫 All staff I have worked with are top-tier professionals and I feel as though I am the most important client. Steven Frank and Jackie are on top of everything, and I believe they truly care. I no longer worry about finances because I listen to my advisors. I can’t thank them enough.
Show more
1 year ago
Terry H
Our family has had great experience as Derek is truly a partner in my financial planning and helps me in many ways. Plus, the other people that I have I worked with on the team- Katie- and others are professional and pro-active and helpful. Over all I couldn't be more pleased with Plancorp as an organization.
1 year ago
Denise B
Life - mine at least - throws too many curveballs to navigate on my own. The advisors at Plancorp share advice based on best practices and life experience,and accommodate variables with nuanced perspective that fits my situation. Researching topics online to educate myself is one thing - trusting the counsel from a highly skilled diverse team is another. I appreciate that there is a team that understands my vision and intentions if things get complicated or something happens to me. The internet or AI is not going to be able to help my family run my business or transition my wealth strategy.
Show more
1 year ago
Carroll I
My family has been with Plancorp since the early 1990s.Our contacts have been with Jeff Buckner, Tom Goldberg, Mike Bruno and now Joleen. We have stuck with Plancorp and they with us through thick and thin economic times. They have been wonderful to a person, always providing sound, thoughtful advice - customer-first position. As a result, we have recommended other friends to join Plancorp. We probably didn't have as much money as others, but we were always treated with kindness and respect! Thank you, Plancorp!!
Show more
1 year ago
Ken V
Our experience with Plancorp, starting with Steve Frank (back in 2000 or so), Chad Frazier and Ben Schwartz has been nothing but very positive. We have since brought our daughter Debbie and Brother/Sister in Law Rich and Marilyn Velten to Plancorp. When my brother died in 2019, Plancorp was of great assistance to Marilyn.
1 year ago
Harry S
We have been with plancorp for over 20 years. Very conservative investment strategy we’ve used. Have always done very well with that strategy. Brian Weiderman has always been prompt, courteous and helpful.
The testimonials displayed are from current clients. Clients were not compensated and there are no material conflicts of interest. Testimonials may not be reflective of the experience of all clients and are not a guarantee of future performance.
DISCOVER WEALTH ALIGNMENT
The Plancorp Crafted Advantage
Without realizing it, most people are stuck in the shallows of basic financial advice. We see great financial planning like an iceberg, with most of the real story happening below the surface.
With a process perfected over 40 years to dive deep and align your wealth with your goals and values, we can craft your advantage.
I'm Ready to Learn More
Real People. Real Results.
Put Our Wide Range of Experience to Work for Your Goals
Robo-advisors claim their algorithm can solve all your problems. When you work with Plancorp, you’re working with the real-life experience of the entire team. You can trust the collective knowledge that has exponentially grown our client base for 40 years.
Meet the Team
Achievements and Recognition
Our Approach is Award-Winning
We are proud of our growth and accomplishments. From local centers of influence to national news outlets, our advice is trusted.
Learn More
Our High Fiduciary Standard. Proud to Be CEFEX-Certified.
WHAT IT MEANS
In short, it means that we do what’s best for our clients, even if it isn’t the easy thing for our team, and that standard is documentable. CEFEX firms submit to an extensive audit that includes a thorough review of processes and adherence to a strict protocol of fiduciary standards.
Learn More
WHY IT MATTERS
Plancorp was one of the first advisory firms in the country to be CEFEX-certified and have been for over 15 years now. We are dedicated to earning client trust and acting in your best interest, and we have the certification to prove it.
Learn More
HOW WE GOT IT
CEFEX advisors are audited to the industry’s best practice standard by expert analysts. Most individual investors don’t have time to deeply research financial advisors. We’re the cream of the crop and you can trust us to work hard for you.
Learn More
